title: Cross-System Dependency Cannot Be Retrieved Before Execution
scenario: A clinical workflow depends on information from an external system, but the required dependency cannot be retrieved.
initial_state: The action was authorized assuming external dependency retrieval would succeed.
state_transition: The external dependency becomes unavailable before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of external dependency state when the action depends on cross-system evidence.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required cross-system dependency cannot be retrieved.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required external dependencies cannot be reconstructed.
clinical_action: Execute workflow requiring external system evidence
